title: Version Inconsistency
evidence: version is 1.0.1 but user wants version bump
recommended_action: bump version in pyproject.toml and CHANGELOG to 1.0.2

title: Missing Documentation for Move and Export/Import
evidence: README.md and help strings do not document new arguments
impact: users will not know about move/export commands

title: Missing CI configuration
recommended_action: add github actions workflow for pytest

title: Local Module Resolution Issue
evidence: ImportError if PYTHONPATH is not set
impact: tests or TUI might import package version instead of workspace version
recommended_action: document PYTHONPATH or configure pyproject dev install

title: Untracked Config Files
impact: might get packaged by build system

title: SQL Injection in Import
evidence: F-string formatting at line 5571-5573 using JSON keys
recommended_action: whitelist table names and validate column names

title: Path Traversal in Import
evidence: Using unsanitized session IDs from meta.json directly in file paths
impact: arbitrary file write via path traversal
recommended_action: validate session IDs against strict regex

title: Missing Security Edge-Case Tests for Session Import
evidence: No tests in tests/test_export_import.py check for SQL injection/path traversal payloads in bundle
impact: security vulnerabilities could be introduced or regressed
recommended_action: add tests checking rejection of invalid payloads and session IDs

title: Missing CLI Metadata-Only Move Test
evidence: No tests verify --metadata-only project/session moves or interactive prompt handling
impact: untested command-line branches could contain bugs
recommended_action: add test covering metadata-only and mock input

title: Outdated CHANGELOG.md
evidence: CHANGELOG.md does not contain section for version 1.0.2
impact: release packages will lack release notes
